title: AN ACT REPEALING ITEM THIRTY-FOUR (e), SUBSECTION (a), TITLE C OF SECTION ONE OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED NINE HUNDRED AND TWENTY, AND APPROPRIATING THE AMOUNT OF FORTY-FIVE THOUSAND PESOS THEREIN PROVIDED FOR THE CONSTRUCTION OF THE CALANAN-TUGA-PINUKPUK ROAD IN MOUNTAIN PROVINCE.

chunks.text:
H. No. 1373 / 51 OG No. 5, 2307 (May, 1955)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 1213, May 10, 1955 ]

AN ACT REPEALING ITEM THIRTY-FOUR (e), SUBSECTION (a), TITLE C OF SECTION ONE OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED NINE HUNDRED AND TWENTY, AND APPROPRIATING THE AMOUNT OF FORTY-FIVE THOUSAND PESOS THEREIN PROVIDED FOR THE CONSTRUCTION OF THE CALANAN-TUGA-PINUKPUK ROAD IN MOUNTAIN PROVINCE.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. Item thirty-four (

e

), subsection (

a

), Title C of section one of Republic Act Numbered Nine hundred find twenty, on page one hundred and fourteen thereof, is hereby repealed, and the sum of forty-five thousand pesos therein provided is hereby appropriated for the construction of the CalananTuga-Pinukpuk Road in Mountain Province.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, May 10, 1955.
